response.justification: Strong generalist software craftsman with ~15 years of experience across web, mobile, and backend, but the resume shows little evidence of the AI/ML depth, cloud platform strategy, or director-level technical leadership the role demands. AI exposure is limited to recent MCP/agent tooling work, and there is no track record of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud product direction at scale.
strengths: Long, varied engineering tenure across multiple stacks and domains
Founder experience with an open-source platform demonstrating ownership
Active in community teaching, workshops, and conference talks
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or AI products at the scale this role requires
No cloud platform strategy or director-level IC leadership experience
Background is hands-on craftsman rather than strategic advisor to customers and partners

key_factors.factor: No cloud/AI strategy leadership track record
Tenure and breadth of engineering experience
